title: Build Manifest
description: Per-machine append-only record of every signed binary produced by build-signed.sh. The cross-domain interface between build-domain (writes) and deploy-domain (reads). Fields aligned to the build.artifact.hashed spine event for cross-validation.

version.description: Manifest schema version. Bumped only on breaking field changes.

entries.description: Append-only list of build records. Idempotent on {commit, crate, identifier, cdhash} — duplicate writes for the same tuple are no-ops.

commit.description: Source commit short SHA at build time. Same field as build.artifact.hashed event.

crate.description: Cargo crate name (e.g., chorus-hooks). One crate may produce multiple identifiers. Same field as build.artifact.hashed event.

identifier.description: Installed binary name (e.g., chorus-hook-shim, chorus-hooks). Same field as build.artifact.hashed event.

cdhash.description: Codesign cdhash. THE binding identity for idempotency, per #2734. Same field as build.artifact.hashed event. TCC AppleEvents binds to this hash.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the signed binary file. Informational; drifts per cargo+codesign timestamp behavior. NOT used for identity. Same field as build.artifact.hashed event.

build_time.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the build.

builder_host.description: hostname -s of the building machine. Same field as build.artifact.hashed event.

builder_role.description: Role attribution. wren/silas/kade/system. Sourced from $DEPLOY_ROLE or $CHORUS_ROLE.
